findings.message: Using curl without --proto "=https" flag is security-sensitive. The HTTP client may follow redirects to clear-text HTTP protocol, which is insecure and can be sniffed, modified or corrupted by attackers.

Automatically installing recommended packages is security-sensitive. Recommended packages may contain vulnerabilities or unnecessary code that increases the attack surface. Use --no-install-recommends flag for apt/apt-get or --without-recommends for aptitude to avoid installing unnecessary packages.
